Redact sensitive text during paste and revert it during copy.

Redact text as you copy/paste. Define rules once; the extension applies them locally—no data leaves your browser.

Full description:
Redact lets you control what’s copied or pasted. Create simple find-and-replace rules, apply them per site, and keep originals when pasting elsewhere.
Key features
• Rule-based redaction during copy/paste
• Per-site enable/disable
• Local storage only; no external data collection

Privacy practices (justifications):
• clipboardRead / clipboardWrite: Used to modify clipboard content during user-initiated copy/paste so rules can apply. No data is transmitted off-device.

• storage: Used to save user-defined rules locally.

Text snippet manager that eliminates repetitive typing. Full support for native keyboard shortcuts.

⚡ SnapType - Smart Snippet Manager

  Stop typing the same text over and over. SnapType lets you save frequently used
  text as snippets and insert them instantly with shortcuts.

  🔥 Key Features

  • Instant Expansion — Type a shortcut like /thanks and it expands into your full
   template automatically
  • Korean IME Support — Works perfectly with Korean input (한글). No missed
  triggers, no broken characters
  • Variable Templates — Use {Name}, {Date}, {Company} as dynamic placeholders. A
  popup lets you fill them in each time
  • Folder Organization — Organize snippets into folders: Email, Sales, CS, Dev,
  and custom folders
  • Works Everywhere — Gmail, Notion, Google Docs, Slack, and any website with
  text input
  • Right-Click Save — Select text on any page and save it as a snippet instantly
  • Multi-Language — Supports 54 languages. UI follows your language preference
  • Dark/Light Theme — Choose dark, light, or match your system setting
  • Privacy First — All data stays on your device. No external servers, no
  tracking

  📋 How to Use

  1. Click the SnapType icon to open the side panel
  2. Create a snippet with a shortcut (e.g., /thanks)
  3. Type the shortcut in any text field → it expands automatically
  4. Use {variables} for dynamic content that changes each time

  💼 Perfect For

  • Customer support — Reply templates with customer name variables
  • Sales — Quote emails, meeting proposals, follow-ups
  • Developers — Code snippets, commit messages, PR templates
  • Anyone — Email signatures, addresses, frequently used phrases

  🔒 Privacy

  SnapType does not collect any personal data. All snippets and settings are
  stored locally using Chrome's built-in storage. No analytics, no tracking, no
  ads.

  SnapType is free and open source.

Clipboard Save is your all-in-one clipboard vault, designed to securely capture and store everything you copy—from text to links—keeping your important content safe and easily accessible. With Clipboard Save, you can:

- Store Up to 150 Items: Securely save and manage up to 150 copied elements.
- View & Remove: Easily browse through your stored items and remove them as needed.
- Export to CSV: Effortlessly organize and share your data by exporting it to CSV format.

Stop worrying about losing crucial snippets. Clipboard Save ensures that everything you copy is safe, organized, and readily available when you need it. Plus, we’re always open to your feedback and eager to implement new features based on your requests. Experience a smoother, more productive workflow with Clipboard Save!

📪 Get In Touch:
Have any questions or suggestions? Reach out to us at 💌 samdevmit@gmail.com
HashiCorp Vault search with persistent auth, background search, and comprehensive results

Advanced search and navigation tool for HashiCorp Vault UI with persistent authentication and comprehensive secret discovery.

🔍 Key Features:
• Deep recursive search across all Vault secrets and KV stores
• Multiple authentication methods (Token, Userpass, LDAP)
• Search within secret keys, values, and metadata
• Case-insensitive and exact match filtering
• Real-time search progress with background processing
• One-click navigation to matched secrets in Vault UI
• Persistent credential storage with secure token management
• Connection status indicator and automatic validation
• Support for Vault namespaces and custom mount paths

⚡ Perfect For:
DevOps engineers, SRE teams, and security professionals managing large Vault deployments who need to quickly locate secrets, audit configurations, or investigate credential usage across multiple KV engines.

🔒 Privacy & Security:
All credentials stored locally in your browser. No data sent to external servers. Direct communication with your Vault instance only.

💡 How to Use:

Click the extension icon and configure your Vault URL
Authenticate with Token, Userpass, or LDAP
Switch to Search tab and enter your search term
View results and click to open secrets directly in Vault UI
Works with HashiCorp Vault's web UI (any URL containing /ui/). Open source and actively maintained.

TextEase isn’t just a text expander — it’s your personal typing automation companion, designed to save time, reduce effort, and boost your writing efficiency everywhere you type.

Boost your Web Research!. Create projects to store texts, export your texts to RTF or Excel to share or use elsewhere

TextVault is a Chrome plugin that provides an efficient solution to the problem of text organization for web users. One of the biggest challenges that web users face today is how to organize the vast amount of information they encounter while browsing. This is especially true for researchers, students, and professionals who need to gather, save, and organize large amounts of text for their work.

TextVault provides a solution by allowing users to create projects and save different texts in each project. This means that users can keep their texts organized and separated by theme or category, making it easier for them to find the information they need later. For example, a student who is researching a topic can create a project for that topic and save all the relevant texts in that project.

TextVault also provides a simple interface that allows users to save and organize their texts without complications. The interface is intuitive and easy to use, which makes it ideal for users who are not tech-savvy. Users can easily create a project, add texts, and export them in an RTF or Excel file.

One of the best features of TextVault is its ability to export texts in an RTF file. This means that users can share their texts with others or use them in other programs. For example, a student who has saved texts on a topic can export them in an RTF file and share them with their classmates. This feature is also useful for professionals who need to share information with their colleagues.

Another useful feature of TextVault is its ability to delete texts. This means that users can modify their texts or add more information at any time. For example, a researcher who has saved a text on a topic can modify it later when new information becomes available. This feature is especially useful for users who need to update their information regularly.

In conclusion, TextVault is a valuable tool for web users who need to save and organize large amounts of text. Its key features, such as project creation, text saving and deleting, text exporting, and simple interface, make it an ideal solution for researchers, students, and professionals. With TextVault, users can keep their texts organized and have access to them at any time from their Chrome browser.

P2P Core — это расширение для Chrome, созданное специально для трейдеров, активно работающих на P2P-площадках криптовалютных бирж.

⚡ Что умеет расширение:
📄 Текстовые шаблоны (макросы)
Быстро отвечайте контрагентам с помощью заготовленных сообщений, хранящихся в облаке.
📎 Отправка изображений прямо из буфера обмена
Обходите ограничения биржи — прикрепляйте скриншоты в чат без сохранения на диск.
🔍 Проверка PDF-квитанций
Загружайте чеки для автоматической проверки на модификации (выполняется на сервере).
💰 Калькуляция доходности по ордерам
Расширение отслеживает ваш статус в ордерах и помогает быстро анализировать прибыльность сделок.
☁️ Безопасное хранение данных
Не собираем личные данные которые могут помогать идентификации личности. Остальные данные шифруются, используются только для работы расширения и не передаются третьим лицам.

💡 Для кого это расширение:
Активные P2P трейдеры
Арбитражники и OTC-продавцы
Все, кто работает с большим потоком сделок и хочет автоматизировать рутину.
Save copied text & screenshots. Auto-organized by domain and date so you never lose track. Lightweight, private, and always on

SnipSnap is a lightweight Chrome extension that quietly captures and organizes the content you copy or screenshot while browsing — so you can stay focused and never lose important information again.

🚀 What It Does
SnipSnap monitors your copied content and browser screenshots and automatically saves them in a personal, searchable log. No manual steps. No setup required. Just install and keep working the way you already do.

Your content is automatically:

🗂 Grouped by domain and date — no tagging needed

🔍 Organized — find what you copied days or weeks ago

🔒 Private — your data stays on your account, never shared

🎯 Why Install SnipSnap?
Whether you're coding, designing, researching, or analyzing data, you likely copy content or take screenshots dozens of times a day. But finding that content later? That’s a pain.

SnipSnap eliminates that pain.

You’ll never have to dig through notes, screenshots folders, or endless tabs again. Everything is saved and organized for you — right where you left it.

🧑‍💻 For Developers
Save code snippets from Stack Overflow, documentation, GitHub, or logs

Quickly retrieve context-specific code from past projects or tools

Keep a passive log of what you're researching while debugging or building

🎨 For Designers
Capture design inspiration, UI elements, or visual bugs instantly

Revisit visual references by the site or date without organizing manually

Build a personal mood board just by browsing and saving

📊 For Finance Professionals & Analysts
Store copied data, insights, or screenshots from dashboards and reports

Create a time-stamped trail of your research or tracking for compliance or review

Capture charts or market data from financial news, Bloomberg, or trading platforms

🎓 For Students & Researchers
Save citations, notes, or visuals from online articles and papers

Keep a traceable log of research organized by source and date

Focus on reading — SnipSnap handles the capture

📢 For Marketers & Content Creators
Grab copywriting inspiration, headline formulas, or ad layouts

Save screenshots of social media posts, landing pages, or campaigns

Build swipe files automatically, organized by site

✨ Key Features
Clipboard and screenshot capture (browser-only, privacy-first)

Auto-organized by website domain and time

Search and filter by date, content type, or source

Fast, lightweight, and runs silently in the background

📸 Before You Start: Enable Screenshot Shortcut
To capture screenshots with SnipSnap, make sure the screenshot shortcut is properly configured:

Open a new tab and go to: chrome://extensions/shortcuts

Look for SnipSnap in the list

Assign or confirm your preferred shortcut for "Capture and crop screenshot" (e.g., Cmd+Shift+P or Ctrl+Shift+P)

You’re good to go!

SnipSnap is designed for anyone who thinks, learns, or builds on the web — and wants to stay organized without extra effort. Install once, and it quietly builds your personal archive of useful content.

No more “Where did I see that?”
No more wasted time retracing your steps.
Just snap, save, and get back to work.

Clipboard manager with history and AI-powered pasting. Use OptionPaste for quick pasting and IntelliPaste for smart auto-fill.

PasteWise is the ultimate clipboard manager designed to simplify workflows and enhance productivity. Whether you’re a writer, coder, data professional, or multitasker, PasteWise helps you manage and organize your clipboard history with ease.

What PasteWise Offers:
	1.	OptionPaste: Quickly access your clipboard history with a key combination. Browse through past clipboard items and select what you need to paste. Perfect for saving time when reusing frequently copied text, URLs, or snippets.
	2.	IntelliPaste (Beta): Take pasting to the next level with AI-powered smart pasting. IntelliPaste intelligently extracts meaningful data from unstructured content and maps it to fields in web forms. This feature is currently in Beta and will be refined based on user feedback.
	3.	Clipboard History: Save and manage up to 20 clipboard items in your history. Never lose important copied content again, and retrieve it when you need it most.
	4.	Powerful Search: Use the search bar to find specific clipboard items quickly and efficiently. No more scrolling through endless history to locate a snippet.
	5.	Customizable Settings: Enable or disable features like OptionPaste and IntelliPaste from the settings panel. Configure your keyboard shortcuts for faster access.

How It Works:
	1.	Copy any text or content, and PasteWise saves it in your clipboard history automatically.
	2.	Use OptionPaste to browse your history and reuse any previously copied content.
	3.	IntelliPaste (Beta) allows advanced users to paste intelligently into web forms, reducing manual data entry.

Who is PasteWise For?
	1.	Writers: Keep your ideas, research, and notes organized in your clipboard history.
	2.	Coders: Quickly reuse code snippets without having to search through files or tabs.
	3.	Data Professionals: Simplify repetitive copy-paste workflows and improve efficiency.
	4.	Multitaskers: Manage your clipboard like a pro, reducing time wasted on repetitive tasks.

What’s Next:

PasteWise is continuously improving! Planned features include:
	•	Real-time cross-device clipboard sync.
	•	OCR functionality to extract text from images and screenshots.
	•	Multimedia clipboard support for saving and pasting images or videos.

These features will be released in future updates, and we’re committed to making PasteWise your go-to productivity tool.

Get Started:
	1.	Install PasteWise from the Chrome Web Store.
	2.	Enable clipboard permissions and configure your settings.
	3.	Start saving time and managing your clipboard smarter today.

PasteWise is in its early stages, and we’d love your feedback to make it even better. Try it now and help shape the future of productivity!
One-click Markdown to Xiaobot-compatible HTML conversion

小报童 (Xiaobot.net) 专栏作者的 Markdown 排版辅助工具。

主要用于解决从 Obsidian、Notion、Typora、VS Code 等本地编辑器复制内容到小报童时，出现的格式错乱、样式丢失问题。无需手动调整 HTML，实现内容的快速发布。

主要功能

- 一键 Markdown 转 HTML： 在小报童的“发布文章”页面右下角增加“MD粘贴”悬浮按钮。点击该按钮，插件会自动读取剪贴板中的 Markdown 源码，转换为适配小报童底层编辑器的格式并填入。

- 主流编辑器格式兼容： 针对不同编辑器的 Markdown 变体进行了适配，支持 Obsidian（包括双链处理）、Notion（标准导出）、Typora、Logseq 及 Heptabase 的复制内容。

排版样式深度优化：

- 多级标题：自动识别并对齐 H1-H3 标题层级，保持文章结构清晰。

- 代码高亮：完整保留代码块格式与语法高亮，解决直接粘贴变成纯文本的问题，适合技术类写作。

- 基础样式修复：完美还原引用块 (Blockquote)、加粗、斜体以及列表的嵌套层级。

- 隐私安全： 本插件为纯客户端扩展，所有解析与转换逻辑均在本地浏览器 (Local) 完成，不会上传任何用户内容到服务器。

使用方法

- 在本地编辑器中完成写作，复制 Markdown 全文。

- 进入小报童发布页面，点击右下角蓝色的“MD粘贴”按钮。

- 确认内容已按正确格式填入编辑器。

Xiaobot Markdown Helper is a productivity extension designed for creators on Xiaobot.net. It solves formatting issues when pasting Markdown content from editors like Obsidian, Notion, and Typora. With a single click, it converts clipboard Markdown into Xiaobot-compatible HTML, ensuring correct rendering of headers, code blocks, and nested lists. All processing is done locally for privacy.

快捷执行钉钉在线表格的扩展脚本

🚀 钉钉在线表格的黑科技自动化外挂，告别繁琐的层层点击，让你的表格脚本一秒执行！

【痛点解决】
在钉钉 (DingTalk) 在线表格中编写和使用自定义运行脚本时，原生的入口极其深：”工具栏 -> 酷应用 -> 脚本 -> 选择指定脚本 -> 运行”。这对于高频使用脚本自动化办公的用户极其低效且痛苦。

【功能特性】
本扩展专为钉钉表格重度用户打造！它在你的浏览器右上角提供了一个极速的小指挥中心：
1. ⚡️ 0毫秒无感加载：采用钉钉内部 API 直连，点击扩展图标瞬间读取当前打开表格下的所有可用脚本。
2. 🖱 一键秒连：在弹窗列表内一键点击选中脚本。
3. 🤖 自动执行：通过向当前聚焦的表格页发送内部指令，自动为您代劳这层层叠叠的繁琐点击。
4. 🚀 知识库无缝穿越：全面支持独立页面表格，且完美攻克钉钉知识库深层内嵌（iframe）的点击难题，任何场景下一键起飞！
5. 📋 剪贴板快捷执行：复制一段钉钉表格脚本代码，点击”执行剪贴板脚本”即可直接运行，无需手动创建脚本。自动复用固定的临时脚本，不产生垃圾。
6. 🧹 干净纯粹：执行完毕后扩展立即关闭，不留痕迹。
7. 🔑 文档上下文自动识别：在钉钉表格页面内，扩展会从当前文档页面读取必要的文档标识信息，用于正确列出当前表格下可执行的脚本，避免因 iframe 场景下标识缺失导致脚本列表获取失败。

让你的复杂报表统计、批量数据处理、流程自动化真正的”一键起飞”！

【隐私及安全声明】
本插件承诺 100% 安全且极尽克制地只申请必要的底层权限：
1. `activeTab`：确保只会对当前您主动激活并可见的钉钉表格发送指令，不干扰后台任何标签。
2. `clipboardRead`：仅在用户主动点击”执行剪贴板脚本”按钮时读取剪贴板内容，不会后台自动读取。
3. 本扩展会在 `alidocs.dingtalk.com` 页面内注入脚本，以便在当前文档页面上下文中读取表格脚本运行所必需的文档标识信息，并在页面内部转发给扩展脚本。该能力仅用于当前页面功能，不新增任何 Chrome 扩展权限。
4. 不收集、不在外部服务器存储、不上传您的任何钉钉敏感数据及个人信息。所有网络请求均由浏览器在您本机遵循同域策略安全发起。
Play text at sprint speed - RSVP reading with voice. Video-player controls, TTS, teleprompter, keyboard shortcuts, customisable.

ReadSoFast turns any selected text into a speed-reading session with optional voice. It uses RSVP (Rapid Serial Visual Presentation) so you can read at sprint speed without moving your eyes.

Features:
• RSVP speed reading – words appear one at a time at your chosen speed
• Text-to-speech (TTS) – listen while you read or use it like a teleprompter
• Video-player style controls – play, pause, speed, skip
• Fully customisable – speed, font size, position, colours
• Keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+Shift+E) to start from selected text
• Right-click “Read So Fast” in the context menu
• Works on any webpage – select text and start reading

Ideal for articles, docs, and long pages when you want to read faster or hands-free. Install once, use everywhere.
Olympia is a Facebook Messenger CRM extension

Olympia is a tool that helps entrepreneurs initiate conversations with potential prospects on Facebook Messenger in an organic way. It eliminates the need to manually send friend requests and allows you to send up to 30 friend requests using targeted keywords.

When a prospect accepts your friend request, Olympia sends a welcome message automatically that includes their first name, which starts the conversation for you.

With Olympia, you can track all your Messenger conversations in one place and keep tabs on where each prospect is in your sales process. Olympia also offers Canned Responses, which allow you to save frequently used sentences, paragraphs, phrases, or images to quickly send to prospects. 

Overall, Olympia is an excellent tool for entrepreneurs looking to get high-paying clients and a steady flow of leads through Facebook.
Paste an image into the search bar with Ctrl+V without the need to click on the picture icon

Instantly paste images into Google search with Ctrl+V, no clicking required
------

Welcome to 2023, where you still can't paste an image directly into Google for an image search.

Unbelievable, right? You have to drag your cursor all the way to the image icon, and then CLICK on it just to use the Ctrl+V shortcut - how nuts is that?

Luckily, I fixed it for you. Well, to be honest I fixed it for me first, then realized I couldn't possibly be the only one driven bonkers by this tiny yet absurdly irritating issue.

So go ahead, download it. It's free. And the next time you copy an image, simply paste it into Google like magic. You can thank me later. Enjoy!
Smart clipboard history manager and text snippet expander. Save, search, and reuse your copied text instantly.

QuickSave is the ultimate clipboard manager and text snippet expander for Chrome. Never lose copied text again!

🗂️ CLIPBOARD HISTORY
• Automatically saves everything you copy
• Smart detection of URLs, emails, phone numbers, and code
• Search through your clipboard history instantly
• One-click copy to reuse any saved item
• Mark important items as favorites

⚡ TEXT SNIPPETS
• Create reusable text snippets with shortcuts
• Type your shortcut (e.g., /email) and it expands to full text
• Perfect for email templates, code snippets, and common responses
• Organize snippets for quick access

🔍 POWERFUL SEARCH
• Find any copied text or snippet instantly
• Filter by content type (URLs, emails, code, etc.)
• Search across your entire clipboard history

🎨 FEATURES
• Clean, modern interface
• Light, Dark, and System theme support
• Export and import your data for backup
• Privacy-focused: all data stays on your device

💎 FREE vs PRO
Free: 10 clipboard items, 5 text snippets
Pro: Unlimited items, unlimited snippets, cloud sync, folders

Perfect for:
• Developers copying code snippets
• Writers managing text templates
• Customer support with common responses
• Anyone who copies and pastes frequently

Save time. Stay organized. Never lose copied text again.
Type text like a real human — with burst typing, word substitutions, fatigue, typos, and natural pauses.

Stop typing the same things over and over. Text Expander is a simple browser extension that saves you time and effort by letting you create custom shortcuts that instantly expand into longer pieces of text.

## What It Does
Text Expander allows you to store frequently used text, like email addresses, standard replies, code snippets, or contact information, under a short keyword. When you type that keyword (e.g., @email) into any text field on any website and press the Tab key, the extension automatically replaces it with the full text you saved (e.g., your.personal.email@example.com).

## Why You Should Install It
Boost Your Productivity: Dramatically reduce the time you spend on repetitive typing. Respond to emails faster, fill out forms in seconds, and streamline your entire workflow.

Eliminate Typos and Errors: By using pre-saved text, you ensure that your messages, code, and data are always accurate and consistent. No more embarrassing typos in your email signature or shipping address.

Create Powerful Templates: With the unique $cursor feature, you can create dynamic templates. After the text expands, your cursor will automatically jump to the exact spot you specified, allowing you to fill in custom details instantly.

Simple and Secure: The intuitive interface makes it easy to add, manage, and back up your shortcuts. Your data can be exported for safekeeping at any time.

Install Text Expander today and let your keyboard do the heavy lifting for you.
Orchestrate your day into harmony. Your quiet rhythm — composing peace with every keystroke.

TypiPat: Orchestrate Your Typing into Harmony

Tired of the noise of repetitive typing? Transform your daily workflow into a seamless symphony with TypiPat v2.0—your "quiet rhythm" providing intelligent text expansion and productivity tools directly within your Chrome browser.

From simple snippets to long-form compositions, TypiPat acts as your conductor for faster, more accurate writing.

🎼 What’s New in Version 2.0?
Composer Studio (Manuscript Editor): A dedicated space for your long-form text compositions. Utilize our Find & Replace (Transpose) feature and track your writing with real-time statistics like Beat Count (Character count) and Caesura (Line breaks).

Side Stage UI: A draggable, "ghost-mode" Floating Action Button (FAB) and Side Stage overlay. Quickly access your Motifs without ever leaving your active tab.

Deep Detection Engine: An enhanced detection system that now supports Shadow DOM and modern frameworks like React, Vue, and Angular. Rhythmic expansion now works across nearly all modern websites, including YouTube and complex CRMs.

Manifest V3 Performance: Completely rebuilt using the latest Chrome standards for faster, more stable, and more secure performance.

✨ Key Features & Benefits
⚡ Blazing Fast Motifs: Set up simple shortcuts (e.g., //sig) that instantly expand into long phrases, email signatures, or boilerplate responses.

✅ Boost Productivity: Significantly reduce typing time so you can focus on more meaningful tasks.

🛡️ Error Reduction: Ensure consistency and eliminate typos in your most frequently used text.

🔒 Security First: The entire rendering engine is built using a secured DOM API for 100% XSS security compliance—your data remains private and safe.
Copy ChatGPT and Gemini equations as PowerPoint-ready MathML.

Formula converter for PowerPoint helps you copy equations from ChatGPT and Gemini into Microsoft PowerPoint as editable math.

When an equation appears on a supported page, the extension adds a small "Copy to PPT" button next to it. Click the button to convert the equation into PowerPoint-ready MathML and copy it to your clipboard. You can then paste it directly into PowerPoint.

This is useful for students, teachers, researchers, and anyone who creates slides with mathematical formulas.

Key features:
- Copy equations from ChatGPT and Gemini.
- Paste equations into PowerPoint as editable math.
- Convert LaTeX or existing MathML into clean MathML.
- Process equations locally in your browser.
- No account required.
- No analytics, ads, tracking, or remote code.
- No data is sent to external servers.

Supported sites:
- chatgpt.com
- gemini.google.com

How to use:
1. Open ChatGPT or Gemini.
2. Hover over an equation.
3. Click "Copy to PPT".
4. Paste the result into Microsoft PowerPoint.

The Rootle.ai extension for Chrome is a powerful tool for Recruiters who need to gather data from job boards quickly and easily. With just a few clicks, you can extract job data from multiple job boards and save it to your Rootle.ai account.

The Rootle.ai extension is designed for efficiency and ease of use. Navigate to the job board you want to scrape, activate the extension, and select the data you want to extract. You can extract the candidate's name and phone number. The extension automatically saves the data to your Rootle.ai account, where you can easily manage and analyze it.

With Rootle.ai, you can save time and streamline your candidate search or recruitment efforts. The extension works with a variety of popular job boards, including Naukri, LinkedIn, Glassdoor, Indeed, and more. Plus, Rootle.ai's advanced AI algorithms can help you reach to the candidates 10x faster and save 80% of recruiter's time.

Try the Rootle.ai extension today and see how it can help you save your time and resources.
